creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Have you build-tested this patch ?

poudriere fails here with:

configure: error: Unable to find Qt4 installation needed by bat
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
Please report the problem to dvl@FreeBSD.org [maintainer] and attach the
"/wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/bacula-bat/work/bacula-7.4.7/config.log" including
the output of the failure of your make command. Also, it might be a good idea
to provide an overview of all packages installed on your system (e.g. a
/usr/local/sbin/pkg-static info -g -Ea).
